subject: Free 90-Day Pilot for Your School
previewText: Try BehaviorSchool Pro for free and see the difference it can make.
body:
Hi [Name],

I'm so confident that BehaviorSchool Pro will transform your school's approach to behavior support that I'm willing to let you try it for free for 90 days.

That's right. No cost, no obligation. Just a chance to see for yourself how our platform can help you:

*   **Improve the quality of your BIPs.**
*   **Save time on paperwork.**
*   **Get better results for your students.**

During the 90-day pilot, you'll get full access to all of our features, as well as dedicated support from our team.

There's no catch. I'm just a school BCBA who is passionate about helping other school-based professionals be more effective and efficient. I know that once you try BehaviorSchool Pro, you won't want to go back to the old way of doing things.

Ready to get started? Click here to sign up for your free 90-day pilot.

[Link to Sign Up for the Pilot]

Sincerely,

Rob Spain, BCBA
